sentences.target: Je monte par l'arrière du bus.

translations.fr: Je monte par l'arrière du bus.
translations.en: I get on at the back of the bus.
translations.es: Subo por la parte de atrás del autobús.
translations.de: Ich steige hinten in den Bus ein.
translations.pt: Entro pela parte de trás do ônibus.
translations.vi: Tôi lên xe buýt ở cửa sau.
translations.nl: Ik stap achterin de bus in.
translations.hi: मैं बस के पीछे से चढ़ता हूँ.
translations.ja: バスの後ろから乗ります。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person singular; subject of the verb 'monte'.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; denotes the action of getting on/going up.
Preposition introducing a path/manner complement ('par l'arrière').
Common noun 'arrière' with elided definite article 'l'' (< le); object of 'par', referring to the rear part.
Contraction of the preposition 'de' and article 'le'; introduces the noun 'bus' as a complement.
Common noun; complement of 'du', specifying the vehicle.

sentences.target: Tu regardes en arrière avant de traverser.
sentences.reading: /ty ʁəɡaʁd ɑ̃ aʁjɛʁ avɑ̃ də tʁavɛʁse/

translations.fr: Tu regardes en arrière avant de traverser.
translations.ipa: /ty ʁəɡaʁd ɑ̃ aʁjɛʁ avɑ̃ də tʁavɛʁse/
translations.es: Miras hacia atrás antes de cruzar.
translations.de: Du schaust nach hinten, bevor du die Straße überquerst.
translations.zh-Hans: 你在过马路前回头看一下。
translations.ru: Ты смотришь назад перед тем, как переходить дорогу.
translations.pt: Você olha para trás antes de atravessar.
translations.he: אתה מסתכל אחורה לפני שאתה חוצה.
translations.vi: Bạn nhìn lại phía sau trước khi băng qua đường.
translations.ar: تنظر إلى الخلف قبل أن تعبر.
translations.nl: Je kijkt achterom voordat je oversteekt.
translations.uk: Ти озираєшся назад перед тим, як переходити дорогу.
translations.hi: तुम सड़क पार करने से पहले पीछे देखते हो.
translations.pl: Patrzysz do tyłu, zanim przejdziesz przez ulicę.
translations.el: Κοιτάς πίσω πριν διασχίσεις τον δρόμο.
translations.nb: Du ser bak deg før du krysser veien.
translations.id: Kamu menoleh ke belakang sebelum menyeberang.
translations.sv: Du tittar bakom dig innan du går över gatan.
translations.ro: Te uiți înapoi înainte să traversezi.
translations.da: Du kigger bagud, før du krydser vejen.
translations.fi: Katsot taakse ennen kuin ylität kadun.
translations.ja: 渡る前に後ろを振り返ります。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 2nd person singular; subject of 'regardes'.
Main verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular; describes the action of looking.
Preposition starting the adverbial PP 'en arrière' ('backwards').
Common noun within the fixed locution 'en arrière'; complement of 'en'.
Preposition introducing a temporal complement ('avant de traverser').
Preposition linking 'avant' to the infinitive ('avant de traverser').
Infinitive verb; complement of the prepositional sequence 'avant de'.

sentences.target: Les sacs sont à l'arrière de la voiture.
sentences.reading: /le sak sɔ̃ a laʁjɛʁ də la vwatyʁ/

translations.fr: Les sacs sont à l'arrière de la voiture.
translations.ipa: /le sak sɔ̃ a laʁjɛʁ də la vwatyʁ/
translations.en: The bags are at the back of the car.
translations.es: Las bolsas están en la parte trasera del coche.
translations.de: Die Taschen sind hinten im Auto.
translations.it: Le borse sono nella parte posteriore dell'auto.
translations.ru: Сумки находятся в задней части машины.
translations.pt: As sacolas estão na parte de trás do carro.
translations.he: התיקים נמצאים בחלק האחורי של המכונית.
translations.vi: Các túi ở phía sau xe.
translations.nl: De tassen liggen achterin de auto.
translations.uk: Сумки знаходяться в задній частині автомобіля.
translations.hu: A táskák az autó hátuljában vannak.
translations.hi: बैग कार के पीछे की तरफ हैं.
translations.el: Οι τσάντες είναι στο πίσω μέρος του αυτοκινήτου.
translations.id: Tas-tas berada di bagian belakang mobil.
translations.sv: Väskorna är längst bak i bilen.
translations.ro: Gențile sunt în partea din spate a mașinii.
translations.cs: Tašky jsou v zadní části auta.
translations.ja: バッグは車の後部にあります。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, plural; determiner of 'sacs'.
Common noun, plural; subject of 'sont'.
Copular verb, present indicative, 3rd person plural; links the subject to a locative complement.
Preposition introducing the locative phrase 'à l'arrière de la voiture'.
Common noun 'arrière' with elided definite article 'l'' (< le); object of 'à', indicating position.
Preposition introducing a noun complement ('de la voiture').
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'voiture'.
Common noun; complement of 'de', specifying the entity whose back is referred to.

sentences.target: Recule un peu en arrière, s'il te plaît.
sentences.reading: /ʁəkyl œ̃ pø ɑ̃ aʁjɛʁ sil tə plɛ/

translations.fr: Recule un peu en arrière, s'il te plaît.
translations.ipa: /ʁəkyl œ̃ pø ɑ̃ aʁjɛʁ sil tə plɛ/
translations.it: Fai un passo indietro, per favore.
translations.vi: Lùi lại một chút, làm ơn.
translations.ar: ارجع قليلاً إلى الخلف، من فضلك.
translations.nb: Gå litt bakover, vær så snill.
translations.ja: 少し下がってください。

tokens.explanation: Imperative, 2nd person singular; directive telling someone to step back.
Indefinite article; part of the quantifying expression 'un peu'.
Adverb meaning 'a little'; modified by 'un' in the fixed expression 'un peu'.
Preposition starting the adverbial PP 'en arrière' ('backwards').
Common noun within 'en arrière'; complement of 'en'.
Contraction of the subordinating conjunction 'si' ('if') and the pronoun 'il'; begins the polite formula.
Clitic personal pronoun, 2nd person singular; indirect object in the idiom 's'il te plaît'.
Verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; part of the idiomatic expression meaning 'please'.
